name: io.github.paperdavid/manoma
description: MCP server for soul.md — your portable AI identity layer. Serves your identity, skills, values, and preferences to any MCP-compatible LLM. Includes write-back tools for decisions, lessons, and current status.

environmentVariables.description: Path to your soul.md file. Defaults to ~/soul.md if not set.
environmentVariables.name: SOUL_MD_PATH
